description: A premium online Spanish studio with an Organic & Earthy archetype. Tone is human, simple, conversation-first. Design is warm, premium, minimalistic, trustworthy. References: Airbnb, Apple, Notion.

headings.rules: Use for all headings (H1-H4). Never center by default. Use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter for sizes > 32px to create an editorial feel.

body.rules: Use for body text, navigation, and small labels. Left-align dense content for better readability.

colors.rules: Never use pure #000000. Tint neutral greys with warmth. Ensure normal text meets 4.5:1 contrast.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy: Use 2-3x more spacing (p-8, p-12, p-16). Containers with borders MUST have generous internal padding to avoid collision.

grid.marketing: Mode A 'Tetris' Grid (Asymmetry, Visual Tension). Mix col-span-full, col-span-4, and col-span-2 to leave breathing room.
grid.dashboard: Mode B 'Control Room' Grid (Density, Scanability). Use tighter gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Utilize full height for children.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Mobile-first design.
spacing_and_layout.media: Images MUST NOT exceed max-h-[80vh] on mobile devices.

surfaces_and_components.cards_and_widgets: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing layouts (bento boxes with border-[#E5E0D8] and #FFFFFF backgrounds). For dashboards, use subtle roundness (max 8px) or sharp edges.
surfaces_and_components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/70 or bg-white/70. Add 1px delicate inner stroke border-b border-[#E5E0D8]/40. Must be sticky/fixed z-50.
surfaces_and_components.hero_overlay: Max overlay opacity bg-black/30 or bg-white/40. If image is dark, use gradient overlay for text legibility. DO NOT use blanket overlay.
surfaces_and_components.buttons_and_ctas: Primary CTA uses accent terracotta (#C65D47). ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-[#A84B38] hover:text-[#F9F6F0]).
surfaces_and_components.forms: Use Shadcn components heavily customized. Strip the default 'Vercel-look'. Left align labels.
surfaces_and_components.booking_flow: Fast and minimalistic. Calendar picker (Shadcn customized) placed organically in a grid. Timezone selector clearly visible.
surfaces_and_components.tables: Go cardless for admin/student dashboard data. Density and clarity are priority.

motion_and_interactions.animations: Subtle and premium. Use hover states (scale-105 for images). Use specific transitions: transition-transform 0.3s ease, opacity 0.3s ease. DO NOT use transition-all.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Add aria-hidden='true' to decorative elements.

images.description: Vibrant warm orange abstract canvas for hero section background (use with white/40 overlay for text contrast).
Friendly Hispanic woman teacher for 'About Lily' section.
Spanish architecture (Plaza de España) for culture or blog section.
People studying in coffee shop for community/student area.
Comfortable living room with books for 'Learn from home' section.

testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='booking-submit-button').
instructions_to_main_agent: Use the media URLs provided EXACTLY as they are. DO NOT use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com. Apply the generous spacing and typography constraints strictly. For bilingual support, implement a clean EN/ES toggle in the navigation header. Use Shadcn extensively for the booking flow and dashboard, but style it to fit the organic/earthy theme.
